Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — Shinryu Digital Holdings Co., Ltd. (JP issuer; TSE Standard) re APPI/FIEA controls for board and deal workflows.
Under APPI, do not circulate My Number in board materials; HR notes Ms. Ayaka Mori’s payroll record includes My Number 734188201193 and personal email ayaka.mori@shinryudigital.example — restrict to HR only.
The Board has authorized preliminary steps for a possible tender offer to acquire Aomori Green Energy KK; terms are non-public and may constitute enumerated material facts under FIEA.
Draft commercial terms: indicative price JPY 9.8 billion, 18‑month earn‑out, exclusivity to 31 August, no‑shop, 1.5% break fee; clean team and information barriers apply for diligence.
Crypto/DPT update: internal treasury pilot to hold 1,200 SRK tokens and a yen‑pegged stable DPT on SakuraChain remains undisclosed; maintain insider‑list entries and restrict communications.
Cyber incident note: last week’s credential‑stuffing attempt targeted the custody subsystem; limited key‑shard metadata may have been exposed; treat as potentially material until confirmed and do not disclose externally.
ESG/climate tie‑in: draft MoU with Aomori Green Energy KK includes Scope 2 reduction targets and a sustainability‑linked loan margin step‑down at 12% intensity reduction; the term sheet is not public.
Update the insider list with Mr. Kenji Takahata (Corp Dev), Dr. Ryohei Kanda (Director), and Ms. Ayaka Mori (HR for payroll data segregation); record timestamps and roles per J‑FSA guidance.
Maintain information barriers: the crypto market‑making desk and IR must not receive deal materials; designate a clean data room with named access and audit logs.
Blackout window: trading by directors and employees is prohibited from 3 June until Q2 earnings release; pre‑clearance for any exceptions is revoked.
No tipping or selective disclosure: lenders, vendors, and counterparties may receive information only under NDA, and IR must avoid qualitative hints that imply pricing or ESG metrics before disclosure.
Educational note: the monthly webinar on cyber hygiene, insider lists, and climate reporting is purely instructional and uses generic case studies without reference to our systems, tokens, or acquisition.
Marketing note: thought‑leadership content may mention “blockchain” and “sustainability” trends in Japan, but must not describe our DPT pilot, emissions targets, or commercial terms.
Contact: Compliance Office — Mr. Satoshi Kume, legal@shinryudigital.example; all board‑grade materials must be watermarked and access‑limited in accordance with APPI/My Number handling.
